mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId, ROLE_NAME AS roleName, USE_YN AS useYn, ROLE_DESC AS roleDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, RANKING AS ranking FROM FWK_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ROLE (ROLE_ID, ROLE_NAME, USE_YN, ROLE_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, RANKING) VALUES (#{dto.roleId}, #{dto.roleName}, #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.roleDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.ranking, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_ROLE SET ROLE_NAME = #{dto.roleName}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE_DESC = #{dto.roleDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, RANKING = #{dto.ranking, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ROLE WHERE ROLE_NAME = #{roleName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ROLE WHERE ROLE_NAME = #{roleName} AND ROLE_ID != #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_USER WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}

SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId, ROLE_NAME AS roleName, USE_YN AS useYn, ROLE_DESC AS roleDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, RANKING AS ranking FROM FWK_ROLE ORDER BY ROLE_ID

SELECT r.*, NVL(uc.USER_COUNT, 0) AS USER_COUNT FROM FWK_ROLE r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROLE_ID, COUNT(*) AS USER_COUNT FROM FWK_USER GROUP BY ROLE_ID ) uc ON r.ROLE_ID = uc.ROLE_ID
ORDER BY r.ROLE_ID DESC ORDER BY r.ROLE_NAME ASC ORDER BY r.ROLE_NAME DESC ORDER BY r.USE_YN ASC ORDER BY r.USE_YN DESC ORDER BY r.ROLE_DESC ASC ORDER BY r.ROLE_DESC DESC ORDER BY r.RANKING ASC ORDER BY r.RANKING DESC ORDER BY r.ROLE_ID ASC
